series_metadata.series_description: The Technical Process Review file contains forms completed by a staff engineer from the Office of Construction Administration (OCA)after visitng a project to observe construction work related to a specification item. The OCA staff engineer reviews the contractor''s work and indicates if the work is in reasonable close conformity to the specification and evaluates the inspection performed by the district''s project staff noting Lessons Learned for the purpose of prviding training to the Districts or updating specifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in shared electronic database for 2 years from completion of the TPR or any required follow ups., Electronic: Delete
